subtasks.summary: Add packageSyncStatus field to work card detail response DTO (none / pending / ready)
subtasks.desc:
[H2] Background | The mobile Tab Form needs to distinguish three states when displaying the form package. These states are derived server-side from the relationship between PlanForm records and Task records — the mobile client should not implement this derivation logic itself. | [H2] packageSyncStatus derivation logic | Condition || packageSyncStatus || Mobile UX | PlanForm WHERE IsDeleted=0 count = 0 || none || Tab Form empty state — no forms assigned. Finish Execution not blocked by forms. | PlanForm WHERE IsDeleted=0 count > 0, Task count = 0 || pending || "Service package sync in progress, wait for a moment." Finish Execution BLOCKED. | Task count > 0 || ready || Show form card list normally. | Note: use PlanForm WHERE IsDeleted=0 (exclude soft-deleted). Do NOT count hard-deleted or soft-deleted PlanForm records. | [H2] Response DTO addition | // Add to Plan.Shared or top-level work card detail response:
"packageSyncStatus": "none" | "pending" | "ready" | [H2] Implementation notes | - Derived at runtime — no new DB column needed. | - Query: count PlanForm (IsDeleted=0) and Task records for the PlanId. | - If PlanId has no PlanForm records at all -> "none". | - If PlanForm records exist but Task count = 0 -> "pending" (consumer not yet processed). | - If Task count > 0 -> "ready". | - If packageSyncStatus = "pending": Finish Execution endpoint must also block (handled in IAMS30-4269). | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - packageSyncStatus field present in GET /api/work-card/detail response. | - Returns "none" when plan has no form assignment. | - Returns "pending" when plan has form assignment but Task not yet created. | - Returns "ready" when Tasks are present. | - Unit test covers all 3 states.

summary: [BE] Form Package — Plan Submit: Outbox Pattern + PlanSubmitted Event → Azure Service Bus → maintenance-execution Consumer
desc:
[H2] Background | Saat Planner submit plan dengan form package di Digiplan, sistem harus memproses form assignment ke maintenance-execution (create WorkOrder, Task, FormSubmission, Cosmos snapshot). Proses ini melibatkan 3 database lintas service, sehingga pendekatan synchronous HTTP call rentan terhadap partial failure yang sulit di-rollback. | Tim setuju menggunakan Outbox Pattern + Azure Service Bus untuk menjamin atomicity dan resilience. | [H2] Arsitektur: Outbox Pattern + Service Bus | [H3] dplan — saat Planner submit plan (DRAFT → SUBMIT) | - [0] Pre-SUBMIT Validation: cek ketersediaan setiap FormCode (lihat IAMS30-4369 untuk FE popup). | - [1] Resolve FormCode → maintenance-strategy.Form (IsActive=1) → FormName terbaru. | - [2] UPDATE PlanForm.FormName. | - [3] Dalam SATU DB transaction: UPDATE DigitalPlanning.Status = SUBMIT + INSERT ke Outbox table → COMMIT. | - [4] Background relay job: poll Outbox (Status=Pending) → publish PlanSubmitted event ke Azure Service Bus → mark Published. | [H3] PlanSubmitted event payload | PlanSubmitted {
  PlanId,
  PlanName,                // DPlanDB.DigitalPlanning.PlanName
  ProjectStart,            // DPlanDB.DigitalPlanning.ProjectStart
  SiteId,                  // DPlanDB.DigitalPlanning.SiteId
  MaintenanceCategoryCode, // DPlanDB.DigitalPlanning.MaintenanceCategoryCode
  MaintenanceCategoryName, // DPlanDB.DigitalPlanning.MaintenanceCategoryName (setelah fix IAMS30-4368)
  AssetNumber,             // DPlanDB.DPEquipment.Equipment
  PlanForms: [
    { FormCode, IsMandatory }  // FormCode (bukan FormId) — versi di-resolve oleh consumer
  ]
} | Event hanya berisi data yang dplan tahu. FormId/FormName/Version dan asset detail di-resolve oleh consumer di maintenance-execution. | [H3] maintenance-execution consumer | // maintenance-execution Service Bus consumer:
[1] Fetch cst-iams-sqldb-services-asset:
      AssetModelCode, AssetModelName, SectionTypeCode
      berdasarkan AssetNumber dari event

[2] Per FormCode dalam PlanForms:
      Fetch maintenance-strategy: FormId, FormName, Version
      (IsActive=1, ambil versi aktif)

[3] SQL upsert WorkOrder (idempotent by PlanId):
      PlanId, Description=PlanName, ScheduleStartDate=ProjectStart,
      SiteCode=SiteId, AssetNumber, AssetModelCode, AssetModelName,
      SectionTypeCode, MaintenanceCategoryCode, MaintenanceCategoryName,
      Source="Digiplan"

[4] SQL upsert Task + FormSubmission (idempotent by PlanId + FormCode):
      Task.Name = FormName (dari step 2)
      FormSubmission.FormId, FormSubmission.FormName, FormSubmission.IsMandatory

[5] Per FormSubmission — Cosmos snapshot:
      DELETE existing docs (safety for retry)
      Cosmos Transactional Batch (partition: FormSubmissionId):
        INSERT tab1_doc, tab2_doc, ... (all-or-nothing)

Edge case — Form di-archive SETELAH SUBMIT tapi SEBELUM consumer process:
  → Step [2] FormCode tidak ditemukan (IsActive=0 / Archived)
  → Task + FormSubmission tetap dibuat (FormName dari PlanForm.FormName sebagai fallback)
  → Cosmos snapshot TIDAK dibuat (skip step [5])
  → Mechanic melihat "Form not available. Please contact your admin."

Retry & DLQ:
  Jika consumer gagal → Service Bus retry otomatis
  Step [3][4] idempotent (upsert) → aman di-retry
  Step [5] delete-then-reinsert → aman di-retry
  Irrecoverable → Dead-Letter Queue → alert ops | [H2] Retry Policy (diterapkan di Service Bus subscription) | Parameter || Value || Alasan | Max Delivery Count || 5 || Cukup untuk transient failure. >5 biasanya indikasi bug permanen. | Lock Duration || 5 menit || Cukup untuk 2 fetch + SQL upsert + Cosmos batch dalam satu attempt. | Backoff || Exponential: 30s, 1m, 2m, 4m || Hindari hammer ke downstream service yang sedang recover. | Dead-Letter Queue || Setelah attempt ke-5 || Alert ke ops. Lebih baik cepat ke DLQ daripada mechanic menunggu berjam-jam. | ⚠️ Exponential backoff TIDAK tersedia native di Azure Service Bus Standard tier. Perlu Premium tier atau workaround via scheduled re-enqueue. Konfirmasi tier sebelum implementasi (lihat subtask IAMS30-TBD: Service Bus Tier Check). | [H2] Perubahan dari desain sebelumnya | - FormCode digunakan (bukan FormId + Version). Versi aktif di-resolve oleh consumer saat event diproses — bukan oleh FE saat Planner memilih form. | - IAMS30-4290 diupdate: DTO menggunakan FormCode + IsMandatory, bukan FormId + FormName + Version. | - IAMS30-4291 diupdate: handler dplan hanya menulis ke Outbox — tidak lagi memanggil MaintenanceExec API secara langsung. | - Consumer di maintenance-execution yang menangani seluruh downstream processing. | [H2] Scope & Service | - dplan: Outbox table DDL, relay job, handler update (Outbox write). | - maintenance-execution: Service Bus consumer, WorkOrder/Task/FormSubmission upsert, Cosmos snapshot. | - Azure Service Bus: topic/subscription setup, retry policy, DLQ. | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - Plan SUBMIT selalu berhasil (status = SUBMIT di DPlanDB) bahkan jika maintenance-execution sedang down. | - PlanSubmitted event eventually di-publish ke Service Bus via relay job. | - Consumer memproses event: WorkOrder + Task + FormSubmission + Cosmos snapshot terbuat dengan benar. | - Step [3][4] consumer idempotent (upsert) — aman jika event diproses ulang. | - Step [5] consumer idempotent (delete-then-reinsert) — aman jika event diproses ulang. | - Jika consumer gagal 5x → masuk DLQ, alert ke ops. | - Edge case form archived: Task+FormSubmission terbuat, Cosmos snapshot skip, mechanic lihat "Form not available". | - packageSyncStatus = pending selama consumer belum selesai (lihat IAMS30-4372). | [H2] Rule: Submit Tanpa Form Package Dibolehkan | Plan bisa di-SUBMIT meski tidak ada form yang di-assign. Dalam kondisi ini: | - PlanForm tidak ada (atau semua IsDeleted=1): PlanSubmitted event tetap di-publish, tetapi array PlanForms kosong []. | - Consumer di maintenance-execution menerima event dengan PlanForms kosong: WorkOrder tetap dibuat, tidak ada Task/FormSubmission/Cosmos yang dibuat. | - packageSyncStatus = "none" (bukan "pending") — karena PlanForm count = 0, bukan karena consumer belum jalan. | - Tab Form di mobile: empty state biasa. Finish Execution tidak terblokir oleh form gate. | Ini adalah flow yang valid dan tidak boleh dianggap error di sisi manapun (dplan, Service Bus, consumer, mobile). | [H3] Acceptance Criteria (tambahan) | - Submit plan tanpa form: PlanSubmitted event published dengan PlanForms=[]. | - Consumer memproses event dengan PlanForms=[]: WorkOrder dibuat, tidak ada Task/FormSubmission/Cosmos. | - packageSyncStatus = "none" untuk plan tanpa form assignment. | - Test: submit empty plan end-to-end -> WorkOrder terbuat, tidak ada Task, packageSyncStatus=none.

subtasks.summary: Update command/DTO: PlanForms menggunakan FormCode + IsMandatory (bukan FormId+Version)
Implement plan submit handler: write PlanSubmitted event ke Outbox table (dalam satu DB transaction dengan status SUBMIT)
subtasks.desc:
[H2] Context | Handler plan submit di dplan tidak lagi memanggil MaintenanceExec HTTP API secara langsung. Sebagai gantinya, handler menulis ke Outbox table dalam satu DB transaction yang sama dengan SUBMIT status change. Relay job yang menangani publish ke Service Bus. | [H2] Handler logic | // Dalam SATU DB transaction di DPlanDB:
1. Resolve FormCode → maintenance-strategy.Form (IsActive=1) → FormName terbaru
2. UPDATE PlanForm.FormName dengan nama terbaru
3. UPDATE DigitalPlanning.Status = 'SUBMIT'
4. INSERT dbo.Outbox {
     EventType = 'PlanSubmitted',
     Payload   = <PlanSubmitted JSON>,
     Status    = 'Pending'
   }
→ COMMIT (atomic)

// Background relay job (dplan):
LOOP:
  rows = SELECT * FROM dbo.Outbox WHERE Status = 'Pending'
  FOR EACH row:
    publish(row.Payload) → Azure Service Bus
    UPDATE dbo.Outbox SET Status = 'Published' WHERE Id = row.Id
  IF publish gagal → log + retry pada iterasi berikutnya
  // Jika DB COMMIT sukses, event PASTI eventually ter-publish | [H2] Perubahan dari desain sebelumnya | - HAPUS: HTTP call ke maintenance-execution API. | - TAMBAH: INSERT ke dbo.Outbox dalam transaction yang sama dengan UPDATE DigitalPlanning.Status. | - Downstream processing (Task, FormSubmission, Cosmos) sepenuhnya ditangani oleh consumer di maintenance-execution — bukan di handler ini. | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - Handler melakukan SUBMIT status change + Outbox INSERT dalam SATU DB transaction. | - Tidak ada HTTP call ke maintenance-execution dari handler ini. | - Jika transaction rollback (misal: FormCode tidak valid), Outbox entry tidak terbuat. | - Integration test: SUBMIT berhasil → Outbox entry terbuat dengan payload yang benar. | - Integration test: SUBMIT gagal (validasi) → Outbox entry tidak terbuat, status tidak berubah.

subtasks.summary: Tests: plan submit Outbox atomicity, relay job publish/retry, payload schema, regression
subtasks.desc: [H2] Scope perubahan test | Test suite untuk plan submit flow diupdate untuk mencerminkan arsitektur Outbox + Service Bus (bukan HTTP call ke MaintenanceExec). | [H2] Test cases | - Submit plan dengan forms: DigitalPlanning.Status = SUBMIT + Outbox entry terbuat dalam satu transaction. | - Submit plan tanpa forms (empty PlanForms): berhasil, Outbox entry tetap terbuat (consumer handle empty case). | - Outbox payload sesuai PlanSubmittedEvent schema (FormCode, bukan FormId). | - Transaction atomicity: jika Outbox INSERT gagal → DigitalPlanning.Status tidak berubah (rollback). | - Transaction atomicity: jika DigitalPlanning UPDATE gagal → Outbox tidak terbuat (rollback). | - Relay job: Outbox row dengan Status=Pending dipublish ke Service Bus → Status diupdate ke Published. | - Relay job: jika publish gagal → row tetap Pending, dicoba lagi pada iterasi berikutnya. | - Tidak ada HTTP call ke MaintenanceExec dalam test (mock harus dihapus/tidak dipakai). | - Regression: existing plan submit behavior (tanpa form package) tidak terganggu. | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - Semua test cases di atas ada dan hijau. | - Tidak ada test yang mock HTTP call ke maintenance-execution. | - Coverage: happy path, partial failure, empty forms, relay job retry.

subtasks.summary: Fix: populate DigitalPlanning.MaintenanceCategoryName on INSERT/UPDATE via MaintenanceCategory join
subtasks.desc:
[H2] Background | DigitalPlanning.MaintenanceCategoryName is currently always NULL — only MaintenanceCategoryCode is saved. This causes WorkOrder.MaintenanceCategoryName in maintenance-execution to also be empty, breaking category display and reporting on mobile. | [H2] Fix | On every INSERT or UPDATE of a DigitalPlanning record, perform a JOIN to MaintenanceCategory and save the Name to MaintenanceCategoryName. | -- On INSERT or UPDATE DigitalPlanning:
SELECT Name AS MaintenanceCategoryName
FROM DPlanDB.dbo.MaintenanceCategory
WHERE MaintenanceCategoryCode = @MaintenanceCategoryCode

-- Store result in DigitalPlanning.MaintenanceCategoryName
-- If no match found, store NULL (do not throw error) | [H2] Scope | - Service: dplan (Services.iAMS.DPlan or equivalent) | - Table: DPlanDB.dbo.DigitalPlanning | - Lookup table: DPlanDB.dbo.MaintenanceCategory | [H2] Rules | - Fix applies to new records only — no backfill of existing records (acceptable per PRD). | - If MaintenanceCategoryCode has no matching MaintenanceCategory record, store NULL without error. | - This fix must be in place before plan creation with form package is deployed, so the PlanSubmitted event (or sync API call) includes a valid MaintenanceCategoryName. | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - When a new DigitalPlanning record is created with a valid MaintenanceCategoryCode, MaintenanceCategoryName is populated. | - If MaintenanceCategoryCode has no match in MaintenanceCategory, MaintenanceCategoryName is NULL and no error is thrown. | - Existing DigitalPlanning records are unaffected. | - WorkOrder.MaintenanceCategoryName in maintenance-execution is non-null for plans created after this fix.

subtasks.summary: [BE] Form Package — Create PlanForm Table in DPlanDB + DRAFT Form Assignment CRUD API
subtasks.desc:
[H2] Background | Currently, IAMS30-4266 (Extend Create Digital Planning) accepts form assignment in the create request and immediately creates Task + FormSubmission + Cosmos snapshot — there is no persistent storage for form assignments during DRAFT phase. This means: (1) Planners cannot add or remove forms after initial plan creation while still in DRAFT, and (2) packageSyncStatus logic (which compares PlanForm count vs Task count) has no source of truth in dplan DB. | This ticket creates the PlanForm table in DPlanDB and implements the DRAFT lifecycle API endpoints. | [H2] Scope | - Service: dplan (Services.iAMS.DPlan or equivalent) | - Database: DPlanDB | - Table: dbo.PlanForm | [H2] Schema | CREATE TABLE [dbo].[PlanForm] (
  [Id]           UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL DEFAULT NEWSEQUENTIALID(),
  [PlanId]        UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,  -- FK to DigitalPlanning
  [FormId]        UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL,  -- FK to Form in maintenance-strategy
  [FormName]      NVARCHAR(255)    NOT NULL,  -- snapshot at assign time, refreshed at SUBMIT
  [IsMandatory]   BIT              NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  [IsDeleted]     BIT              NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,  -- soft delete on unassign
  [CreatedAt]     DATETIME         NOT NULL DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
  [CreatedBy]     NVARCHAR(255)    NOT NULL,
  [ModifiedAt]    DATETIME         NULL,
  [ModifiedBy]    NVARCHAR(255)    NULL,
  CONSTRAINT [PK_PlanForm] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([Id]),
  CONSTRAINT [FK_PlanForm_Plan] FOREIGN KEY ([PlanId])
    REFERENCES [dbo].[DigitalPlanning] ([Id])
) | [H2] API Endpoints | Method || Endpoint || Description | POST || /api/digitalPlanning/{planId}/forms || Add one or more forms to a DRAFT plan. Upsert by PlanId+FormId. | PUT || /api/digitalPlanning/{planId}/forms/{formId} || Update IsMandatory for an assigned form (DRAFT only). | DELETE || /api/digitalPlanning/{planId}/forms/{formId} || Soft-delete (IsDeleted=1) a form from assignment (DRAFT only). | GET || /api/digitalPlanning/{planId}/forms || List all active (IsDeleted=0) form assignments for a plan. | [H2] Business Rules | - All write operations (add, update, delete) are only allowed when plan status = DRAFT. Return 400 if plan is SUBMIT or higher. | - Unassigning a form uses soft delete (IsDeleted=1) — never hard delete. | - FormName is stored at assignment time (snapshot). Re-fetched from maintenance-strategy at plan SUBMIT time to ensure latest name. | - Upsert by PlanId+FormId: if form already exists (IsDeleted=0), update IsMandatory. If exists with IsDeleted=1, restore it (IsDeleted=0). | - GET endpoint returns only IsDeleted=0 records. | - TenantCode isolation enforced from JWT. | [H2] Integration with IAMS30-4266 | After this table is in place, IAMS30-4266 (Extend Create Digital Planning) should be updated to: (1) read form assignments from PlanForm table instead of the request body, and (2) trigger the Task+FormSubmission+Cosmos snapshot creation from PlanForm records. Coordinate with assignee of IAMS30-4266. | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - PlanForm table created in DPlanDB with correct schema. | - POST endpoint adds forms to DRAFT plan — upsert by PlanId+FormId. | - PUT endpoint updates IsMandatory for DRAFT plan forms. | - DELETE endpoint soft-deletes form from DRAFT plan. | - GET endpoint returns only active (IsDeleted=0) forms. | - All write operations blocked when plan status is not DRAFT — returns 400. | - Integration tests: add, update, soft-delete, restore; attempt write on SUBMIT plan returns 400. | [H2] Business Rules Tambahan | [H3] Submit tanpa form assignment dibolehkan | Plan bisa di-SUBMIT meski tidak ada form yang di-assign (PlanForm kosong atau semua IsDeleted=1). Dalam kondisi ini: | - Tab Form di mobile menampilkan empty state — tidak ada form card. | - Finish Execution tidak diblokir oleh form gate (packageSyncStatus = "none"). | - Tidak ada error, tidak ada warning — ini adalah flow yang valid. | [H3] Form assignment terkunci setelah SUBMIT | Begitu plan berpindah ke status SUBMIT (atau lebih tinggi), SEMUA write operation ke PlanForm diblokir: | Operation || DRAFT || SUBMIT / INPROGRESS / FINISH / CANCEL | Tambah form (POST) || Diperbolehkan || DITOLAK — return 400 | Update IsMandatory (PUT) || Diperbolehkan || DITOLAK — return 400 | Hapus form (DELETE soft) || Diperbolehkan || DITOLAK — return 400 | Baca daftar form (GET) || Diperbolehkan || Diperbolehkan (read-only) | Error message saat write di-block: "Form package cannot be modified after plan is submitted." (HTTP 400) | Ini berlaku untuk SEMUA pihak termasuk Planner sendiri — tidak ada override. | [H2] Acceptance Criteria (tambahan) | - Submit plan tanpa form assignment: berhasil, packageSyncStatus = "none", Finish Execution tidak terblokir. | - Write operation pada plan SUBMIT: return 400 dengan pesan yang tepat. | - Write operation pada plan DRAFT: berhasil. | - Read operation pada plan SUBMIT: berhasil (read-only tidak terblokir). | - Test: empty submit flow, lock enforcement pada tiap endpoint (POST/PUT/DELETE).

subtasks.summary: SSDT DDL: Create dbo.Outbox table in DPlanDB
subtasks.desc:
[H2] File | Database.iAMS.DPlan/dbo/Tables/Outbox.sql | [H2] Schema | CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Outbox] (
  [Id]          UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL DEFAULT NEWSEQUENTIALID(),
  [EventType]   NVARCHAR(100)    NOT NULL,  -- e.g. "PlanSubmitted"
  [Payload]     NVARCHAR(MAX)    NOT NULL,  -- JSON serialized event
  [Status]      NVARCHAR(20)     NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pending',
                                           -- "Pending" | "Published" | "Failed"
  [CreatedAt]   DATETIME         NOT NULL DEFAULT GETUTCDATE(),
  [PublishedAt] DATETIME         NULL,
  [Error]       NVARCHAR(MAX)    NULL,      -- last error message jika gagal
  CONSTRAINT [PK_Outbox] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([Id])
);

-- Index untuk relay job polling
CREATE INDEX [IX_Outbox_Status_CreatedAt]
  ON [dbo].[Outbox] ([Status], [CreatedAt]); | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - Outbox table terbuat di DPlanDB dengan schema di atas. | - Index IX_Outbox_Status_CreatedAt terbuat. | - Deploy ke dev tanpa data loss.

subtasks.summary: Relay job: poll dbo.Outbox (Pending) -> publish ke Azure Service Bus -> mark Published
subtasks.desc:
[H2] Context | Relay job adalah background service (IHostedService/BackgroundService) di dplan yang secara periodik membaca Outbox rows Status=Pending dan mempublishnya ke Azure Service Bus. | [H2] Logic | // Berjalan sebagai BackgroundService di dplan
LOOP setiap N detik (default: 5s, configurable):
  pendingRows = SELECT TOP 10 * FROM dbo.Outbox
                WHERE Status = 'Pending'
                ORDER BY CreatedAt ASC

  FOR EACH row:
    TRY:
      await serviceBus.PublishAsync(row.EventType, row.Payload)
      UPDATE dbo.Outbox
        SET Status='Published', PublishedAt=GETUTCDATE()
        WHERE Id = row.Id
    CATCH exception:
      UPDATE dbo.Outbox SET Error=exception.Message WHERE Id=row.Id
      // Status tetap Pending -- retry iterasi berikutnya
      log.Warning("Relay failed for {row.Id}: {exception.Message}") | [H2] Configuration (appsettings) | - ServiceBus:PlanSubmittedTopic -- nama topic | - ServiceBus:RelayJobIntervalSeconds -- default 5 | - ServiceBus:RelayJobBatchSize -- default 10 | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - Relay job berjalan sebagai background service saat dplan startup. | - Outbox Status=Pending dipublish ke Service Bus dan Status diupdate ke Published. | - Jika publish gagal: Error field diupdate, Status tetap Pending, dicoba lagi iterasi berikutnya. | - Relay job tidak crash jika Service Bus tidak tersedia -- log warning dan lanjutkan. | - Unit test: publish berhasil -> Published; publish gagal -> tetap Pending + Error terupdate.

subtasks.summary: Service Bus setup: konfirmasi tier, topic/subscription, retry policy (Max 5, Lock 5min, exponential), DLQ alert
maintenance-execution: Service Bus consumer -- upsert WorkOrder, Task, FormSubmission, Cosmos snapshot (idempotent)
subtasks.desc:
[H2] Context | Consumer subscribe ke PlanSubmitted event dan menangani seluruh downstream processing di maintenance-execution. Semua step harus idempotent karena consumer bisa dipanggil ulang oleh Service Bus retry. | [H2] Consumer flow | // maintenance-execution Service Bus consumer:
[1] Fetch cst-iams-sqldb-services-asset:
      AssetModelCode, AssetModelName, SectionTypeCode
      berdasarkan AssetNumber dari event

[2] Per FormCode dalam PlanForms:
      Fetch maintenance-strategy: FormId, FormName, Version
      (IsActive=1, ambil versi aktif)

[3] SQL upsert WorkOrder (idempotent by PlanId)

[4] SQL upsert Task + FormSubmission (idempotent by PlanId + FormCode)

[5] Per FormSubmission -- Cosmos snapshot:
      DELETE existing docs (safety for retry)
      Cosmos Transactional Batch (partition: FormSubmissionId):
        INSERT tab1_doc, tab2_doc, ... (all-or-nothing)

Edge case -- Form di-archive SETELAH SUBMIT tapi SEBELUM consumer process:
  Task + FormSubmission tetap dibuat (FormName dari event payload sebagai fallback)
  Cosmos snapshot TIDAK dibuat
  Mobile tampilkan "Form not available. Please contact your admin."

Jika consumer gagal -> Service Bus retry
Step [3][4] idempotent (upsert) -> aman di-retry
Step [5] delete-then-reinsert -> aman di-retry
Irrecoverable -> Dead-Letter Queue -> alert ops | [H2] Idempotency rules | - WorkOrder: upsert by PlanId -- jika sudah ada, update fields, jangan duplikasi. | - Task: upsert by PlanId + FormCode -- jika sudah ada, skip. | - FormSubmission: upsert by TaskId -- jika sudah ada, skip. | - Cosmos: DELETE existing docs by FormSubmissionId, lalu INSERT fresh. Aman di-retry. | [H2] Edge case: FormCode tidak ditemukan di maintenance-strategy | - Terjadi jika form di-archive setelah plan SUBMIT tapi sebelum consumer process. | - Task + FormSubmission tetap dibuat, FormName diambil dari event payload (fallback). | - Cosmos snapshot TIDAK dibuat untuk form tersebut. | - Consumer TIDAK throw exception -- form lain dalam event tetap diproses. | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - Consumer subscribe dan process PlanSubmitted event. | - WorkOrder, Task, FormSubmission terbuat dengan field yang benar. | - Cosmos snapshot terbuat per FormSubmission (per tab). | - Semua step idempotent -- event duplikat tidak menghasilkan data ganda. | - Edge case form archived: Task+FormSubmission terbuat, Cosmos skip, tidak throw. | - Integration test: event diproses -> semua records terbuat. | - Integration test: event duplikat -> tidak ada data ganda. | - Integration test: FormCode tidak ditemukan -> partial success, form lain tetap diproses.

summary: [BE] Form Package — Add Column FormName and IsMandatory
desc: [H2] Background | As part of the Form Package Integration for PM Shutdown, the  | FormSubmission |  table in the  | maintenance-execution |  SQL database needs to store two additional attributes: the form name (to avoid a secondary call to  | maintenance-strategy |  when displaying the form list) and a mandatory flag set by the Planner at the time of plan creation. | [H2] Objective | Alter the  | FormSubmission |  table to support form package assignment by adding  | FormName |  and  | IsMandatory |  columns. | [H2] Scope | - Database:  | cst-iams-sqldb-services-maintenance-execution |  (dev, staging, production) | - Table:  | dbo.FormSubmission | [H2] Requirements | No || Column || Type || Nullable || Default || Description | 1 || FormName || Nvarchar(255) || Yes || NULL || Name of the form at the time of plan creation. Populated from  | maintenance-strategy |  during snapshot creation. Existing records left as NULL. | 2 || IsMandatory || Bit || No || 0 || Whether this form is mandatory for Finish Execution gate. Set by Planner at plan creation. Existing records default to 0 (not mandatory). | [H2] Business Rules | - Existing records in  | FormSubmission |  must not be affected beyond the default values above. | - FormName |  captures the form name at snapshot time — changes to the form name in  | maintenance-strategy |  after snapshot creation do not affect this value. | - IsMandatory = 0 |  for all existing records (backward compatible). | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - FormName |  column exists in  | FormSubmission |  with type  | Nvarchar(255) | , nullable. | - IsMandatory |  column exists in  | FormSubmission |  with type  | Bit | , default value  | 0 | , not nullable. | - Existing records remain intact with  | FormName = NULL |  and  | IsMandatory = 0 | . | - Migration script applied successfully in dev, staging, and production without data loss. | - No regression on existing form submission flows.

subtasks.summary: Migration: backfill FormName=NULL and IsMandatory=0 for existing FormSubmission records after ALTER TABLE
subtasks.desc:
[H2] Background | When FormName and IsMandatory columns are added to FormSubmission (IAMS30-4264 base scope), existing records will have NULL for both. For IsMandatory this is acceptable behavior (defaults to 0 / not mandatory). For FormName the NULL is also acceptable per PRD (existing data does not need backfill). However, a migration script should confirm no unintended side effects and set IsMandatory = 0 for any NULLs to enforce the default. | [H2] Script | -- After ALTER TABLE: set IsMandatory default for existing rows
UPDATE dbo.FormSubmission
SET IsMandatory = 0
WHERE IsMandatory IS NULL;

-- FormName left as NULL for existing records (acceptable per PRD)

-- Verify:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS should_be_zero FROM dbo.FormSubmission WHERE IsMandatory IS NULL; | [H2] Rules | - IsMandatory must be non-null after migration — default 0 for existing rows. | - FormName stays NULL for existing rows — no backfill needed. | - Script is idempotent. | [H2] Acceptance Criteria | - No existing FormSubmission records have IsMandatory = NULL after migration. | - Verification query returns 0. | - FormName remains NULL for pre-existing records — no error. | - New FormSubmission records created after this change have FormName and IsMandatory populated correctly.
